specific_question: What percentage of dealers rated their relationship with Elexion Automotive positively?
answer: As of September 2024, Elexion Automotive's dealer satisfaction survey showed that 72% of franchise partners rated their relationship with Elexion Automotive as "excellent" or "very good".
dr_question: If Elexion Automotive shifts from dealership franchising to a direct-to-customer sales model, how could it capture the benefits of the transition to drive sales and higher margins in 2027?
